name: Kathleen Battle
abstract: Kathleen Deanna Battle (born August 13, 1948) is an American operatic soprano known for her distinctive vocal range and tone. Born in Portsmouth, Ohio, Battle initially became known for her work within the concert repertoire through performances with major orchestras during the early and mid-1970s.

about_quotes.speaker: Christian McBride
about_quotes.evidence: I had a chance to work with Kathleen on her latest... I played on it
about_quotes.doc_title: Christian McBride interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Ed Shaughnessy Part II
about_quotes.evidence: I can’t sit here and say Kathleen Battle shouldn’t be in the opera house, because she’s not a middle-European descendent.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ed Shaughnessy Part II interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 25, 1998 [interview 1 of 2]
